reason_for_decision: The article now covers source ownership, uncertainty, latency, auditability, and feedback loops, which gives it enough design depth to pass.
strengths: It treats fusion as a staged process rather than a vague feature.
The operator-facing uncertainty and tiered-output sections improve practical value.
The brand-specific detour has been removed.
summary_assessment: This version passes. It is now properly framed as a system-design article rather than a short fusion summary.
